greeting: I'm here to help you quickly find answers to common HR policy questions and simulate various HR processes for testing purposes. Let me know how I can assist you today!

suggestedPrompts.title: Vacation Policy
suggestedPrompts.prompt: What is the company's policy on vacation and paid time off?

suggestedPrompts.title: Expense Report Procedure
suggestedPrompts.prompt: Can you outline the steps for submitting an expense report?

suggestedPrompts.title: Health Benefits Overview
suggestedPrompts.prompt: Provide an overview of our employee health insurance benefits.

suggestedPrompts.title: Simulate Leave Request
suggestedPrompts.prompt: Simulate the process for an employee requesting a personal leave of absence.

suggestedPrompts.title: Simulate New Hire Onboarding
suggestedPrompts.prompt: Simulate the typical onboarding process for a new full-time employee.

suggestedPrompts.title: Remote Work Guidelines
suggestedPrompts.prompt: What are the key guidelines and policies regarding remote work arrangements?
